title: pelargonium × regium
intro: Pelargonium × regium, also known as the Rose Geranium or Royal Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Pelargonium × regium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to regulate hormonal imbalances and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × regium include tea, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
